description: HockeyStack is a B2B GTM analytics and attribution platform that connects marketing and sales data from impressions to revenue with AI-powered reporting.
overview: HockeyStack unifies sales and marketing data into GTM analytics and attribution, tracking pipeline from impression to deal with AI reporting, scoring, and prebuilt dashboards.
what_is: HockeyStack is a GTM analytics and intelligence platform that turns sales and marketing data into clear insight. It tracks performance across channels, funnels, and campaigns with AI-powered reporting and scoring, so revenue teams can optimize spend and connect pipeline to revenue.

It is strongest at marketing and account intelligence and GTM workflow automation. Prebuilt dashboards and AI insights are available within about a day of setup, which suits leaders aligning sales and marketing and prioritizing accounts.

HockeyStack integrates with CRMs, marketing automation, and data sources for end-to-end visibility. It complements rather than replaces a CRM or email platform, focusing on data-driven strategy instead of managing individual contacts.
